visible_product_cards.evidence: Login/Register wall with 'New shoppers get up to 70% off' promo, Email field, Continue button, Passkey/Google/Facebook SSO options

blocking_signals.visible_text: Register/Sign in | Your information is protected | Email | Continue | Disable session PIN | Passkey | Google | Facebook | More options
blocking_signals.evidence: AliExpress requires registration/login before accessing product listings. Full-page login wall with SSO options.
blocking_signals.impact: Cannot access any product content without authentication
blocking_signals.suggested_handling: Provide authenticated session cookies or use SSO login flow

visual_action_hints.reason: Login wall requires browser interaction for authentication flow

recommended_action_plan.reason: AliExpress requires authenticated session - need login cookies or SSO token
Browser runtime needed for login flow interaction
